title: Provide Protection from Malicious Code
description: Provide protection from malicious code at appropriate locations within organizational systems.

checks.name: Antivirus or EDR Solution is Installed and Running
checks.purpose: Verify an antivirus or endpoint detection and response (EDR) solution is installed, running, and its service is active

checks.name: Real-Time Protection is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm real-time or on-access scanning is enabled to detect and block malicious code as files are accessed

checks.name: Antivirus Definitions are Current
checks.purpose: Verify antivirus/EDR signature definitions are up to date and were last updated within the defined window (typically 24-48 hours)

checks.name: Antivirus Covers All Required Scan Locations
checks.purpose: Confirm the antivirus solution is configured to scan all critical paths including system directories, user profiles, and removable media

checks.name: Antivirus or EDR Solution is Installed and Running
checks.purpose: Verify an antivirus or EDR solution is installed, running, and its service is active on the server

checks.name: Real-Time Protection is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm real-time or on-access scanning is enabled on the server

checks.name: Antivirus Definitions are Current
checks.purpose: Verify antivirus/EDR signature definitions are up to date on the server

checks.name: Antivirus Exclusions are Documented and Minimal
checks.purpose: Confirm antivirus exclusions are limited to vendor-required paths and are not overly broad, which would create protection gaps

checks.name: Antivirus or Malware Detection Tool is Installed
checks.purpose: Verify ClamAV, ESET, Sophos, or an equivalent antimalware tool is installed on the Linux system

checks.name: Malware Scanner is Active or Scheduled
checks.purpose: Confirm the antimalware tool is running as a daemon or has a scheduled scan configured via cron or systemd timer

checks.name: Malware Definitions are Current
checks.purpose: Verify malware detection signatures or databases are up to date and were last updated within the defined window

checks.name: Rootkit Detection is Configured
checks.purpose: Confirm rkhunter or chkrootkit is installed and scheduled to run periodically to detect rootkits and backdoors

checks.name: Antivirus or Malware Detection Tool is Installed
checks.purpose: Verify ClamAV or equivalent antimalware tool is installed on this Debian system

checks.name: Malware Scanner is Active or Scheduled
checks.purpose: Confirm the antimalware tool has a scheduled scan configured via cron or systemd timer on Debian

checks.name: Malware Definitions are Current
checks.purpose: Verify ClamAV or equivalent signatures are up to date on Debian

checks.name: Rootkit Detection is Configured
checks.purpose: Confirm rkhunter or chkrootkit is installed and scheduled to run periodically on Debian

remediation: Deploy and configure Windows Defender or an approved EDR solution. Enable real-time protection. Ensure definitions update automatically at least daily. Minimize antivirus exclusions and document any required exclusions. On Linux, install ClamAV with freshclam and configure rkhunter or chkrootkit with scheduled scans.
